---
title: "Arg Tech Sales Dashboard"
description: "Interactive Quarto dashboard for modeled automotive marketing leads, appointments, and sales."
format:
  dashboard:
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - theme.scss
    orientation: rows
---

```{ojs}
campaigns = [
  {month: "Jan", channel: "Google Ads", spend: 1800, leads: 82, sales: 5},
  {month: "Feb", channel: "Google Ads", spend: 2100, leads: 96, sales: 6},
  {month: "Mar", channel: "Google Ads", spend: 2400, leads: 112, sales: 8},
  {month: "Apr", channel: "Google Ads", spend: 2600, leads: 138, sales: 9},
  {month: "Jan", channel: "Marketplace", spend: 500, leads: 74, sales: 4},
  {month: "Feb", channel: "Marketplace", spend: 650, leads: 88, sales: 5},
  {month: "Mar", channel: "Marketplace", spend: 850, leads: 104, sales: 7},
  {month: "Apr", channel: "Marketplace", spend: 950, leads: 126, sales: 8},
  {month: "Jan", channel: "Organic Search", spend: 300, leads: 24, sales: 1},
  {month: "Feb", channel: "Organic Search", spend: 350, leads: 30, sales: 2},
  {month: "Mar", channel: "Organic Search", spend: 400, leads: 36, sales: 2},
  {month: "Apr", channel: "Organic Search", spend: 450, leads: 42, sales: 3},
  {month: "Jan", channel: "Referrals", spend: 150, leads: 18, sales: 2},
  {month: "Feb", channel: "Referrals", spend: 180, leads: 24, sales: 2},
  {month: "Mar", channel: "Referrals", spend: 220, leads: 30, sales: 3},
  {month: "Apr", channel: "Referrals", spend: 250, leads: 35, sales: 3}
]

funnel = [
  {stage: "Listing Views", users: 4650},
  {stage: "Digital Leads", users: 341},
  {stage: "Qualified Buyers", users: 128},
  {stage: "Appointments", users: 42},
  {stage: "Modeled Sales", users: 22}
]

channels = Array.from(new Set(campaigns.map(d => d.channel)))
viewof selectedChannel = Inputs.select(["All"].concat(channels), {label: "Channel", value: "All"})
filtered = selectedChannel === "All" ? campaigns : campaigns.filter(d => d.channel === selectedChannel)
```

# Row {height=18%}

## Listing Views {.valuebox icon="graph-up" color="primary"}

4,650

## Digital Leads {.valuebox icon="funnel" color="success"}

341

## Appointments {.valuebox icon="calendar-check" color="warning"}

42

## Modeled Sales {.valuebox icon="bar-chart-line" color="info"}

22

# Row {height=42%}

## Lead Trend

```{ojs}
Plot.plot({
  height: 330,
  marginLeft: 64,
  y: {grid: true, label: "Leads"},
  x: {label: "Month"},
  color: {legend: true},
  marks: [
    Plot.lineY(filtered, {x: "month", y: "leads", stroke: "channel", marker: true, tip: true}),
    Plot.dot(filtered, {x: "month", y: "leads", fill: "channel", r: 5, tip: true})
  ]
})
```

## Funnel Progression

```{ojs}
Plot.plot({
  height: 330,
  marginLeft: 116,
  x: {grid: true, label: "Users"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(funnel, {x: "users", y: "stage", fill: "#0f766e", tip: true}),
    Plot.text(funnel, {x: "users", y: "stage", text: d => d.users.toLocaleString(), dx: 28})
  ]
})
```

# Row {height=40%}

## Spend Efficiency

```{ojs}
Plot.plot({
  height: 300,
  marginLeft: 64,
  x: {label: "Spend"},
  y: {label: "Sales", grid: true},
  color: {legend: true},
  marks: [
    Plot.dot(filtered, {x: "spend", y: "sales", fill: "channel", r: d => Math.sqrt(d.leads), tip: true}),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```

## Recommended Actions

::: {.insight-list}
- Scale SUV and truck campaigns because they show the strongest sales signal.
- Use marketplace listings for fast local conversations and buyer questions.
- Post inspection and repair proof to reduce buyer hesitation.
- Add GA4 event validation before the next dealership campaign launch.
:::
